verses.text: I need not write of the ministering; your zeal 'hath provoked very many.' A good example. Their readiness stirred others to give.
I need not write of the ministering; your zeal 'hath provoked very many.' A good example. Their readiness stirred others to give.
I send the brethren that ye be ready, your bounty 'a matter of bounty, and not... of covetousness.' Willing gift. Giving should be free, not grudging.
I send the brethren that ye be ready, your bounty 'a matter of bounty, and not... of covetousness.' Willing gift. Giving should be free, not grudging.
I send the brethren that ye be ready, your bounty 'a matter of bounty, and not... of covetousness.' Willing gift. Giving should be free, not grudging.
He that soweth sparingly reaps sparingly; 'God loveth a cheerful giver.' Sow bountifully. Cheerful giving is what pleases God.
He that soweth sparingly reaps sparingly; 'God loveth a cheerful giver.' Sow bountifully. Cheerful giving is what pleases God.
'God is able to make all grace abound toward you'; He has dispersed and given to the poor. Abounding grace. God supplies the generous.
'God is able to make all grace abound toward you'; He has dispersed and given to the poor. Abounding grace. God supplies the generous.
He multiplies your seed, enriching you 'to all bountifulness,' which causes thanksgiving. Enriched to give. God gives more that we may give more.
He multiplies your seed, enriching you 'to all bountifulness,' which causes thanksgiving. Enriched to give. God gives more that we may give more.
This service abounds in thanks to God; 'thanks be unto God for his unspeakable gift.' The greatest gift. All giving flows from God's gift of Christ.
